class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>米<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>米<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>，<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huà</rt></ruby><ruby>临<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lín</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：

“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>未<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>腹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>晓<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby>；<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>未<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>母<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>胎<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tāi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>分<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>别<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bié</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby>；<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>派<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>国<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuó</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiān</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>怎<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zěn</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>年<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nián</rt></ruby><ruby>幼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>‘<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>年<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nián</rt></ruby><ruby>幼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>’，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>差<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chāi</rt></ruby><ruby>遣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>谁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuí</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qù</rt></ruby>；<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>吩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>咐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fu</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">me</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huà</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>惧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jù</rt></ruby><ruby>怕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pà</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>拯<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhěnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>救<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>于<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>伸<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēn</rt></ruby><ruby>手<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>按<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>口<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huà</rt></ruby><ruby>传<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chuán</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>哪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>今<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jīn</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>立<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>邦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>国<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuó</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>施<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shī</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>拔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bá</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby>、<ruby>拆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chāi</rt></ruby><ruby>毁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huǐ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>毁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>坏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huài</rt></ruby>、<ruby>倾<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>覆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>建<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>立<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby>、<ruby>栽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zāi</rt></ruby><ruby>植<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhí</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>米<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">mǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">de</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">mìnɡ</rt></ruby>

那Nà时shí，巴Bā比bǐ伦lún王wánɡ的de军jūn队duì正zhènɡ攻ɡōnɡ打dǎ耶Yē路lù撒sā冷lěnɡ，又yòu攻ɡōnɡ打dǎ犹Yóu大dà所suǒ剩shènɡ下xià的de城chénɡ邑yì，就jiù是shì拉Lā吉jí和hé亚Yà西xī加jiā。原Yuán来lái犹Yóu大dà的de坚jiān固ɡù城chénɡ只zhǐ剩shènɡ下xià这zhè两liǎnɡ座zuò。8、9西Xī底dǐ家jiā王wánɡ与yǔ耶Yē路lù撒sā冷lěnɡ的de众zhònɡ民mín立lì约yuē，要yào向xiànɡ他tā们men宣xuān告ɡào自zì由yóu，叫jiào各ɡè人rén任rèn他tā希Xī伯bó来lái的de仆pú人rén和hé婢bì女nǚ自zì由yóu出chū去qu，谁shuí也yě不bù可kě使shǐ他tā的de一yí个ɡè犹Yóu大dà弟dì兄xiōnɡ作zuò奴nú仆pú。（此cǐ后hòu，有yǒu耶Yē和hé华huá的de话huà临lín到dào耶Yē利lì米mǐ。）
